entities.description: Eleanor Roosevelt, an elegant woman, is positioned in the top-left corner of the background scene, holding a laptop Macbook Pro, wearing a red long-sleeved dress and a gold earring.
Jeff Bezos, a muscular man in a blue t-shirt and dark jeans, is positioned in the top-right corner, slightly below and to the right of Eleanor Roosevelt, touching and standing next to her.

Muhammad Ali, a young woman with short hair, is centered in the mid-ground, slightly below and to the left of Jeff Bezos, touching and standing next to him. She is holding a bàn phím cơ Keychron, adorned in a yellow crop top, dark jeans, and a silver necklace.
Usain Bolt, a teenage boy wearing a Barcelona home kit, is anchored in the bottom-left foreground, below and to the left of Muhammad Ali, touching and near her.
